FMtopic.Title: Performance Based Navigation (PBN) Information
FMtopic.Para: Applying dispatch relief for the following items may affect the ability of the airplane to meet certain operational requirements. The following table lists items that must be operational for various PBN operations. This information can aid in identifying potentially affected capabilities associated with a particular dispatch configuration. A complete list of equipment requirements may be found in the 787 RNP Navigation Capabilities Document D613Z033-01, Revision I (or later). Operators must consult their Operations Specification for requirements applicable to their operations.

FMtopic.Title: PBN Equipment Requirements

entry.Para: RNP AR APCH operations require two Autopilot Flight Function (AFF) with auto pilot and flight director function.

RNP APCH, RNP 1/RNP 2, RNAV 1/RNAV 2, P-RNAV, B-RNAV, RNAV 5, RNP 2/RNP 4, RNP 10/RNAV 10 and Advanced RNP operations require a single Autopilot Flight Function (AFF) with auto pilot and flight director function.

Para.Emphasis: 27-02-02 Flight Control Module (FCM) - Air Data Reference Function

entry.Para: RNP AR APCH, RNP APCH, RNP 1/RNP 2, RNAV 1/RNAV 2, P-RNAV, B-RNAV, RNAV 5, RNP 2/RNP 4, RNP 10/RNAV 10 and Advanced RNP operations require a single Air Data Reference Function (ADRF). ADRF function is hosted inside each of the 3 FCMs.

RNP AR APCH, RNP APCH, RNP 1/RNP 2, RNAV 1/RNAV 2, P-RNAV, B-RNAV, RNAV 5, RNP 2/RNP 4, RNP 10/RNAV 10 and Advanced RNP operations require two Primary Flight Displays (PFD) with mini map (2 outboard DUs) and two Multi-Function Display (MFD) (2 inboard DUs) .

RNP AR APCH, RNP APCH, RNP 1/RNP 2, RNAV 1/RNAV 2*, P-RNAV*, B-RNAV*, RNAV 5*, RNP 2/RNP 4, RNP 10/RNAV 10* and Advanced RNP operations require two Inertial Reference Unit (IRU) or one IRU and one AHRU (ref. item 34-21-01-02).

FMtopic.Para: *Configuration with one IRU and one AHRU also requires one GPS (Ref. 34-31-05).

entry.Para: RNP AR APCH, RNP APCH, RNP 1/RNP 2, RNAV 1/RNAV 2*, P-RNAV*, B-RNAV*, RNAV 5*, RNP 2/RNP 4, RNP 10/RNAV 10* and Advanced RNP operations require one Altitude/Heading Reference Unit (AHRU) and one Inertial Reference Unit (IRU) (Ref. item 34-21-01-01).

FMtopic.Para: *Configuration with one IRU and one AHRU also requires one GPS (Ref. 34-31-05).

entry.Para: RNP AR APCH, RNP APCH*, RNP 1/RNP 2*, RNP 2/RNP 4, and Advanced RNP* operations require two Global Positioning System (INR-GPS).
RNAV 1/RNAV 2, and P-RNAV, B-RNAV, RNAV5 operations require one Global Positioning System (INR-GPS).
RNP AR APCH operations require two Radio Altimeters.
No Radio Altimeter requirements for RNP APCH, RNP 1/RNP 2, RNAV 1/RNAV 2, P-RNAV, B-RNAV, RNAV 5, RNP 2/RNP 4, RNP 10/RNAV 10 and Advanced RNP operations.
RNP AR APCH operation requires one Terrain Awareness Function.
No GPWS requirements for RNP APCH, RNP 1/RNP 2, RNAV 1/RNAV 2, P-RNAV, B-RNAV, RNAV 5, RNP 2/RNP 4, RNP 10/RNAV 10 and Advanced RNP operations.
RNP AR APCH operation requires one Terrain Awareness Function.
No Terrain Awareness Function requirements for RNP APCH, RNP 1/RNP 2, RNAV 1/RNAV 2, P-RNAV, B-RNAV, RNAV 5, RNP 2/RNP 4, RNP 10/RNAV 10 and Advanced RNP operations.
RNAV 1/RNAV 2, and P-RNAV, B-RNAV, RNAV5 operations require one Distance Measuring Equipment (DME).

RNP AR APCH, RNP APCH, RNP 1/RNP 2, RNAV 1/RNAV 2, P-RNAV, B-RNAV, RNAV 5, RNP 2/RNP 4, RNP 10/RNAV 10 and Advanced RNP operations require two Flight Management Computers (FMC). (Note: flight management computing is accomplished via FMF application S/W residing in the Common Core System (CCS)).
RNP AR APCH, RNP APCH, RNP 1/RNP 2, RNAV 1/RNAV 2, P-RNAV, B-RNAV, RNAV 5, RNP 2/RNP 4, RNP 10/RNAV 10 and Advanced RNP operations require current Navigation Database.

FMtopic.Para: **It is assumed that the operator has a preflight procedure to ensure that the navigation database complies with regulatory agency requirements for ensuring the navigation database remains valid for the duration of the flight unless an alternative regulatory agency approved process applies.
